message:
feat(sqlmodel-macros): implement sa_relationship override support (bd-38g)

Add extended relationship attributes for SQLAlchemy-style configuration.

Changes:
- Add LazyLoadStrategyAttr enum with 8 loading strategies
- Add new RelationshipAttr fields: order_by, lazy_strategy, cascade, uselist
- Add LazyLoadStrategy enum to sqlmodel-core
- Update RelationshipInfo with new fields and builder methods
- Update code generation to include new relationship fields
- Add 7 comprehensive tests for new relationship parsing

Usage example:
```rust
#[sqlmodel(relationship(
    model = "children",
    order_by = "created_at DESC",
    lazy_strategy = "selectin",
    cascade = "all, delete-orphan",
    uselist
))]
children: Related<Vec<Child>>,
```

Lazy strategy options: select, joined, subquery, selectin, dynamic,
noload, raise_on_sql, write_only

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
